rows.label: qev014301_MSG0001
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]-san!
I am glad we could meet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Since then, Alice and I have been investigating
the culprit who obstructed the speech, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0003
rows.name:
As expected, we were able to obtain information
that it was the work of Alex and his group.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0004
rows.name:
I was looking for you
because I wanted to borrow your strength once again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev014301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Express concern for Eliza
and ask if her injuries are okay.

rows.label: qev014301_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev014301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask how she managed to track down
the sniper's identity.

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0005
rows.name:
A highly skilled Ma-non doctor provided care,
and I was able to safely recover like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0006
rows.name:
To repay this debt of gratitude,
we must stop Alex's reckless actions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ever since those guys fled outside NLA,
they've been hiding in the shadows![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0008
rows.name:
And I hear they are gathering
Dolls and weapons to slaughter
all the aliens in this city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0009
rows.name:
If we do not capture them as soon as possible,
it will lead to an irreversible situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Therefore, we spoke with Chacha-san,
the capable Nopon informant who uncovered
the connection between Alex and the culprit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0011
rows.name:
We would like you to learn Alex's whereabouts
and stop his evil deeds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0012
rows.name:
By now, we have many
Nopon collaborators, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0013
rows.name:
And one of them, the informant Chacha,
told us about it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0014
rows.name:
According to him, Alex is at his hideout
gathering weapons and Dolls
in order to massacre the aliens in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0015
rows.name:
If they only attacked me, that would be one thing...
But we cannot permit such a plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please speak with Chacha-san,
pinpoint their location, and this time
put a stop to their evil deeds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0017
rows.name:
How about it?
Will you accept this request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Even now, I still believe that if we converse with Alex,
we can get him to repent and reform, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Their recent actions are deviating from common sense.
If danger approaches you[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0020
rows.name: The use of force may be unavoidable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0021
rows.name:
You're way too kind, Eliza-san...
Those guys shot you, remember?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0022
rows.name:
I absolutely can't forgive them!
Guys like that... they should just die![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_JNK0110
rows.name: Punish

rows.label: qev014301_SEL0111
rows.name:
Say they should face the consequences
for the crimes they've committed.

rows.label: qev014301_JNK0120
rows.name: Peace

rows.label: qev014301_SEL0121
rows.name:
Say you will try to negotiate
as much as possible.

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0023
rows.name: ...Was I being too naive after all?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0024
rows.name:
If that naivety has led
to many sacrifices...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Then this time, perhaps I should do
as you and Alice suggest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0026
rows.name:
I will leave everything to you.
Please stop their plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0027
rows.name: Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Having someone as kind as you
gives me courage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0029
rows.name:
Please, follow your convictions
and push forward on your path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0030
rows.name:
...I'm counting on you, then.
Please stop their evil plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0031
rows.name:
I hear the informant Chacha-san is
in West Moby Street...
Please go hear his story first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0032
rows.name:
The informant Chacha-san is
in West Moby Street.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0033
rows.name:
He says he cannot give any more
information to amateurs like us, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Please negotiate with him
and get him to tell you the information about Alex.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0035
rows.name:
It seems you figured out
the whereabouts of Alex and his group.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0036
rows.name:
Please head to Kurogane no Tairiku immediately
and put a stop to his evil deeds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0053
rows.name:
I am glad you are safe.
It appears you were able to stop them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0054
rows.name:
With this, the world will be at peace...
I wonder if it really will be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0055
rows.name: Yes, the real struggle begins now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0056
rows.name:
Yeah, it'll be fine!
We'll definitely make everyone smile together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0057
rows.name: There have been numerous sacrifices leading up to this point...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0058
rows.name:
From now on, I want to make this a noble city
of freedom, equality, and non-violence,
without letting a single person fall victim.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_JNK0310
rows.name: Skeptical

rows.label: qev014301_SEL0311
rows.name: Ask if it's really okay to leave it to Eliza.

rows.label: qev014301_JNK0320
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev014301_SEL0321
rows.name: Personally cheer Alice on.

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0059
rows.name:
No.
It would be troubling if it were left to me alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0060
rows.name:
Because from now on, NLA will be a city
where Earthlings and Aliens alike
join hands and live freely and equally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0061
rows.name:
Alice and I,
along with everyone else, will decide its future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0062
rows.name:
You don't even have to tell me!
Of course I plan to do my best!
With Eliza-san, and with everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0063
rows.name:
So that Earthlings and Aliens can get along,
live in this city with smiles,
and build relationships like friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0064
rows.name:
Oh right, Eliza-san.
We have to hand over the reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0065
rows.name:
Yes, indeed.
Thank you very much for lending us
your hand so many times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0066
rows.name:
I pray that this will be the last time
we have to offer you a reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014301_MSG0067
rows.name:
We will always be praying
that one day, everything will be safely resolved![ST:wait ]
